_README: Manual fixes / additions for players.json. Survives every script re-run.
_USAGE: Copy this to overrides.json and edit. process.py picks it up automatically.

476._comment: Example: fix existing player by vlr.gg ID — patch only the wrong fields

custom_retired_001._comment: Example: add a brand-new player not in vlr.gg stats (use any unique fake id)
